knowledge_base_name: Md Shahajalal Mahmud — Portfolio AI Assistant Knowledge Base
source_documents: Master CV / Engineering Profile Documentation (last updated May 2026)

files.description: High-level overview: identity, professional summary, engineering philosophy, AI development philosophy, long-term goals.
One-line, short, extended, and recruiter-facing bios.
Academic history: NUBTK (BSc CSE), HSC, SSC — institutions, dates, grades.
Professional experience: Founder & Lead Engineer at Appriyo; Freelance Software Developer.
Technical skills by category (languages, Android, backend, frontend, architecture, infra, AI/ML, soft skills), each with proficiency level, practical experience, and associated projects.

Full project portfolio grouped by status (production/active, completed, engineering practice, legacy), each with overview, problem solved, technologies, architecture, key features, challenges, achievements, and current status.
Services offered through Appriyo and freelance work: Android development, backend/API development, fullstack/web development, SaaS product engineering, technical consulting.
Summary table of achievements and engineering milestones.
Formal certifications/licenses with issuer, date, and verification link.
Open-source contributions and public GitHub repository index.
Freelance engagement history and client project details.
Appriyo company profile: role, products, achievements, founding story.
Pre-answered frequently asked questions for quick AI assistant responses.

maintenance_notes: This knowledge base was generated strictly from three uploaded source documents: GitHub README, Master CV, and Career.md. No facts were invented.
Where documents did not provide sufficient detail (e.g., architecture/challenges for some projects), files note 'Not detailed in source documents' rather than fabricating content.
Two portfolio URLs appear in source material (netlify.app and shahajalal.me) — flagged in contact.md for verification.
To keep this knowledge base current, re-run the generation process whenever the source CV/Career.md/README files are updated, and update 'last_updated' in this file accordingly.
